textByHashes.9cb3bc65b4ad1c0bd0fb6d050cd9bec9fc121e27: Aye, mate, but wouldn't it be just as rude for us to interrupt?
textByHashes.2d7b7ba5fe371a211d493561362e9024ef47138c: You're not wrong, mate. We often place matters of industry above those of people, and it's chippin' away at our ability to relate to each other on a human level.
textByHashes.2667541332ebf6b0bb9e8fc453b81f930c36123c: We're considering the moral implications of doing exactly that, mate.
textByHashes.2de11cbd341470646b4e7bd9a7d1a34578ba7181: But thinking, talking, discussing, it's what makes us human, mate.
textByHashes.bab4d373c0689234100836e37cb698d5b2791d86: Fair play, mate. I guess we're reflecting more on the condition of sen'ience in general then.
textByHashes.b868dc0e440169fa9f429b3b15e9534f4562e26b: She's the archaeologist in charge of the dig into these ruins they've found. Discovering the mysteries of the past and that.
textByHashes.08c58ce2e0e625a5702e4809dbc2c868246666fd: Ah, well it's unfortunate, but no reason to be sad. It's them that ought to be sad.
textByHashes.b4751625306fbdfc9a77a7d736834604003fb183: We wish 'em the best. Hopefully their paths to personal growth are near and smooth.
textByHashes.4b955196d313bbe8c3ecccb92ef57ceb000982b9: Thanks for taking care of those base camps, mate.
textByHashes.d7036ba03264f5c9bf4c7b371784c8cba165a3fa: We may not be mul'i-disciplined adventurers like you, but we don't need to be. The world needs more than just heroes, don't it?
textByHashes.5c78e12db06e5196d502d0e233e922c1328929f9: Besides, without us, building supplies wouldn't be there in the first place. Life's all about working together.
textByHashes.97f264bdc2f56dd2c52a865868c59e27257838ae: Life's unpredictable, mate. No sense stressin' over what's out of your control.
textByHashes.282e68cc397fa6e2150482da3b5174f58f683253: We may not be in total control of our surroundings, but we can still impact them positively through our actions. Like bein' here to support you.
textByHashes.76337672f4107617d61da9c15c39a68c18e550d5: You made a mistake. Coulda been any of us. Just gotta make sure we learn from our mistakes is all.
textByHashes.739295ccc40e3acd93f7e0f0c4f53d5d33206c53: We never had any doubts! Always knew you'd get it sorted, mate.
textByHashes.5ab27d12c827cafdd19ae3870f8e7fa8c9b5b007: Never better, mate. Never better. This here ruin was the find of the century!
textByHashes.dc6162272dcf1ef76b9970889d7feacb929e183e: Pretty good, mate. There was a little commotion in here earlier, but things soon got straightened out.
textByHashes.971f5bb9f6f7595900df46d2f732535dd7a7db59: Makes you wonder why someone would try to mess with her in the first place.
textByHashes.e0514b5c2223932588f3292c808046ac8bd0ce05: Too right. Glad I'm not one of them. I'll just stick to my attempts at being a top-notch builder, thank you very much.
textByHashes.8464a5dae12b39bb5783ddb31ddb04c2892ef248: Though sometimes a distraction can be a good thing. We're all 'bout efficiency these days, but sometimes it can be good to take a step back.
